name: harbormaster-mcp
summary: Multi-project MCP router + operator dashboard for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor. Ask any local or SSH-reachable project a question without `cd` — the project's subagent loads its own CLAUDE.md and Serena memories and answers. Ships with a live web console: KPI strip, inter-project network graph, trace waterfall, memory editor, multi-axis budgets. Part of the FleetQ ecosystem.
